title: Training Budget and Professional Development Requests
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through the company's formal request process. To initiate a request, please complete the Professional Development Request Form available on the HR portal. Ensure that you provide details about the training program, its relevance to your current role, and the expected benefits to the team and company. Submit your completed form to your direct supervisor for initial approval. Once approved, your supervisor will forward it to the HR department for final review. Please allow 2-4 weeks for processing. If you have any questions or need assistance, contact the HR team at hr@company.com. Remember, the training budget is allocated on a first-come, first-served basis, so it’s advisable to submit your requests early in the fiscal year.
